description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a classic design, featuring two vertically oriented doors on the front. The doors have a paneled structure with arched upper sections and dark central panels, giving the wardrobe a traditional and elegant appearance. The handles are small, round knobs positioned at a comfortable height for opening the doors. The sides and top of the wardrobe are plain, with a slightly protruding top edge that adds a subtle decorative touch. The wardrobe appears to be constructed primarily from painted wood, with the possibility of metal hardware for the handles and hinges. Its overall finish is smooth and matte, with a predominantly white color accented by the dark door panels.
description: A tall, white paneled wardrobe with two arched doors featuring dark central panels and round knob handles. The design is classic and elegant, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: The wardrobe is seen from the side, showing a plain, flat white surface with no visible features.
description_view_1: Another side view, identical to view 0, displaying a smooth, featureless white panel.
description_view_2: The front view reveals two paneled doors with arched tops, dark central panels, and two small round knob handles.
description_view_3: This is the same as view 1, showing the opposite side of the wardrobe with a plain white surface.
